title.purpose: Panel titles, nav labels, and primary object labels.

body.purpose: Operational copy, metadata, descriptions, and record summaries.

label.purpose: Small grouping labels and compact metadata headers.

shadows.name: hairline-surface
shadows.purpose: Admin panels and list containers that need a tiny edge without looking lifted.

shadows.name: composer-lift
shadows.purpose: Composer shells should sit in the same low-elevation family as panels and cards.

shadows.name: auth-card-lift
shadows.purpose: Login cards and focused authentication steps.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, and state feedback.

motion.name: status-fade
motion.purpose: Subtle feedback copy transitions on the public feedback form.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action control for submission, invocation, and confirmed workflow progression.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 90%, black); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The default quiet action used for navigation, reset, and non-primary operations.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--secondary) 82%, black); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: The standard rounded field for forms, filters, and compact configuration entry.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--foreground); } .ds-field-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input { height: 2.75rem; width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--input); border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--background); color: var(--foreground); padding: 0 1rem; font: 400 0.875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact metadata for lifecycle state, runtime status, and platform scope labels.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--secondary); color: var(--secondary-foreground); padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font: 500 0.75rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }

components.name: Workspace Panel
components.description: A restrained admin console container for inventory, manifests, executions, and runtime records.
components.html:
Manifest registry

No records yet.
components.css: .ds-panel { min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 70%, transparent); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.78); color: var(--foreground); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.03); font-family: Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-panel-header { border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 70%, transparent); padding: 1rem 1.25rem; } .ds-panel-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.25; font-weight: 600; } .ds-panel-body { padding: 1rem 1.25rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Quiet app-shell navigation with icon, label, and active or hover fill.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; border: 0; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: var(--sidebar-foreground); padding: 0 0.75rem; font: 500 0.875rem/1.2 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: var(--muted-foreground); } .ds-nav-item:hover, .ds-nav-item[data-active="true"] { background: var(--secondary); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); }

components.name: Composer Dock
components.description: An OpenAI-like composer surface: low-padding, panel-radius, parent-width, growing textarea, and the landing field's gray-to-blue circular upward-arrow send button.
components.css: .ds-composer { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 10px 8px 12px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 78%, transparent); border-radius: 0.5rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.86); color: var(--foreground); box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(15,23,42,0.03); font-family: Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: left; } .ds-composer-input { width: 100%; min-height: 44px; border: 0; resize: vertical; background: transparent; color: var(--foreground); padding: 4px 2px; font: 400 0.9375rem/1.55 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; } .ds-composer-input::placeholder { color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--foreground) 58%, transparent); } .ds-composer-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; padding-top: 2px; } .ds-composer-tool { height: 30px; border: 0; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: var(--muted-foreground); padding: 0 8px; font: 500 0.8125rem/1 Geist, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-composer-tool:hover { background: var(--secondary); color: var(--foreground); } .ds-composer-send { width: 32px; height: 32px; padding: 0; border: 0; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; background: #b6bbc3; color: #ffffff; transition: background 180ms ease, opacity 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-composer-send-active, .ds-composer-send:not(:disabled) { background: radial-gradient(220% 180% at 50% 42%, #689ff0 0%, #5f95e3 48%, #568cd8 70%, #5085d0 84%, #4d82cb 100%); box-shadow: inset 0 0 20px rgba(55,102,171,0.2), inset 0 0 34px rgba(45,89,154,0.11), 0 1px 3px rgba(47,102,184,0.04); } .ds-composer-send svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-composer-send:hover { opacity: 0.92; } .ds-composer-send:disabled { background: #b6bbc3; color: #ffffff; opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-composer-send:focus-visible, .ds-composer-tool:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--ring); }

narrative.overview:
Neutrino Web is a restrained product interface for developers operating a composable AI platform. It should feel precise, calm, and intuitive: a surface where platform state is legible, runtime actions are controlled, and every visible affordance earns its place.

The system is cool-toned, low-chroma, and task-first. It uses familiar product UI primitives, pill controls, light panels, tonal borders, and soft blur only where structure or focus requires it. It rejects the visual weight of enterprise admin suites and the generic rhythm of SaaS dashboards.
keyCharacteristics: Cool near-white surfaces with one measured blue accent.
Geist-led typography with compact hierarchy and readable body rhythm.
Pill controls and gently rounded panels, used consistently.
Tonal layering before shadow; elevation is rare and structural.
Direct, operational copy that names platform state and user action.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Runtime blue is the only saturated product color. Do not introduce extra brand accents unless the shared design-system tokens add them first.

rules.name: The Contrast Before Subtlety Rule
rules.body: Muted text is allowed only when it remains readable. Body copy and placeholders must meet WCAG AA.

rules.name: The Product Sans Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce display fonts, serif pairings, or decorative type for app surfaces. Product confidence comes from clarity and consistency.

rules.name: The Sparse Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracking is reserved for small section labels and should not become a page-wide eyebrow pattern.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Needed Rule
rules.body: Default product surfaces are bordered and tonal, not floating. Add shadow only when the component moves above another layer or captures active input.

dos: Do use shared @neutrino/ui primitives and tokens before adding page-specific visual rules.
Do keep platform state inspectable before action: show scope, actor, lifecycle state, run IDs, bindings, and provenance when they matter.
Do reserve accent for primary action, current selection, focus, and meaningful runtime state.
Do use tonal borders and low-chroma surfaces to support dense data without visual noise.
Do test muted copy and placeholders for WCAG AA contrast.
Do use lucide icons consistently inside buttons and navigation affordances.
donts: Don't make Neutrino look like Salesforce, Oracle, a generic SaaS dashboard, or Supabase.
Don't introduce a second component library or page-specific spacing, color, typography, or radius system.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism. Blur is structural only.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, hero-metric layouts, or repeated identical icon-card grids.
Don't add extra saturated accents unless the shared design system owns them.
Don't replace standard product affordances with custom controls for flavor.
